ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the performance took place */,
  "gap_time" INTEGER /* Duration in seconds between the song before and the song after */,
  "set_number" INTEGER /* Set number of the performance */,
  "song_before_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song played before */,
  "song_after_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song played after */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Special notes about the performance */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments about the performance */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed */,
  "setlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setlist used for the performance */,
  "performance_duration" TEXT /* Total duration of the performance */,
  "audience_engagement" TEXT /* Notes on audience engagement */,
  "technical_issues" TEXT /* Notes on any technical issues during the performance */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the performance */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_song_after_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_after_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_song_before_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_before_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue in terms of audience size */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the venue */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the venue */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the venue */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the song */,
  "lyricist" TEXT /* Name of the lyricist */,
  "composer" TEXT /* Name of the composer */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album the song is from */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., artist, manager, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance being accessed or modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)
